title: Taj SATS is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Taj SATS is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at Taj SATS are looking for an experienced Guest Relations Manager based out of Ahmedabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Taj SATS:
Taj SATS is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in MICE

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Taj SATS!
